channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: TCB to start truck sales of essentials Monday
item.description:
Importance: 104.0 | Covered by: 10 feeds | Reputation: 8.1

Matched titles:
- TCB launches Eid-ul-Azha truck sales
- TCB to begin 10-day Eid-ul-Azha truck sales today
- TCB to start truck sales of essentials today
- TCB to launch Eid-ul-Azha truck sales Monday

- TCB to start truck sales of essentials tomorrow
- TCB to begin 10-day Eid-ul-Azha truck sales tomorrow
- 720 TCB trucks to sell essentials from tomorrow, ahead of Eid-ul-Adha
- TCB to launch Eid-ul-Azha truck sales Monday
- TCB to launch Eid-ul-Azha truck sales Monday
- TCB truck sales begin Tuesday
- TCB to launch Eid-ul-Azha truck sales Monday
- TCB to launch nationwide truck sale ahead of Eid-ul-Azha
- TCB to launch nationwide truck sale ahead of Eid-ul-Azha
